title: Technetium
description: The modpack for the Beep Boop Central minecraft server. Focused on tech and creativity, with a good amount of exploration, magic, generation, aesthetic, and qol mods for a rounded experience.
body:
`beep!`

The Fabric 1.20.1 modpack for the Beep Boop Central minecraft server. Focused on tech and creativity, with a good amount of exploration, magic, generation, aesthetic, and qol mods for a rounded experience.

Recommended setting for Java Memory: at least 2.5gb.

If you crash or lag, try the .a and .b beta branches.

For the .d beta, you might need to disable Distant Horizons before creating a world.

#

### Main Mods:

  - `Create` [along with a bunch of addons]
  - `Modern Industrialization` [gregtech for mortals]
  - `Botania` [magitech, naturally]
  - `Hex Casting` [melt your mind with arcane programming]
  - `Runic Enchanting` [explore and experiment for a better way to enchant]
  - `Ad Astra` [spaaaaaaaaaaaaace!]
  - `The Bumblezone` [beeeeeeees!]
  - `Tectonic` [better terrain]
  - `Terralith` [new biomes]
  - `Bits and Chisels` [build with pixels]
  - `Blahaj` [:3]
  - `Figura` [customize your player model]
  - `Origins` [and several addons]
  - `Farmer's Delight` [live your cottagecore fantasy]
  - `Press Alt to Meow` [:3]
  - `bbc_recipes` [made for this pack, adds needed recipies]
  - `Open Parties and Claims` [just in case]
